summary: Iteration 15 - Complete testing of OCB TITAN AI new features: AI Store Prediction, AI Fraud Detection, AI CFO Module, Payroll Files. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major pages working. Found and fixed critical bugs including double /api/ prefix in CFODashboard.jsx, AIWarRoomSuper.jsx, Employees.jsx; missing ai_warroom router in server.py; wrong import in ai_cfo.py and ai_warroom.py.

fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Changed import to 'from database import get_db'

Removed /api prefix from api.get calls in AIWarRoomSuper.jsx

action_items: Products.jsx: Photo upload section is coded but NOT displayed in Tambah Item Baru modal - need to add photo upload UI inside modal
critical_code_review_comments: Pattern issue: Multiple files (CFODashboard.jsx, AIWarRoomSuper.jsx, Employees.jsx) used /api/ prefix with api service that already adds /api - suggest code review to ensure consistency across all pages
ai_cfo.py and ai_warroom.py had wrong import (from server instead of from database) - suggest verifying all route files use correct import pattern

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major pages working, 1 minor UI feature missing)
